description_of_loss: On 08/03/2026, a tree located on property owned by Elena V. Marchetti at 4500 W. Colfax Avenue, Denver, CO 80204 fell onto our insured's property at 9800 Hillwood Parkway, Fort Worth, TX 76177. The tree, which our arborist confirms was dead or severely diseased prior to the incident, caused substantial damage to our insured's fence and landscaping.
